subtasks.description: Query spend data for Adobe and Microsoft products across all 2024 quarters (Q1–Q4). Compute quarter-over-quarter spend change and rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single SQL query task requiring multi-quarter aggregation, QoQ calculation (LAG window function), and within-group ranking (RANK/ROW_NUMBER). No cross-source reconciliation or document extraction is needed. Mid tier (Sonnet) is sufficient for the multi-table join and window function logic without the complexity of multiple CTEs with sophisticated filtering or inference that would require Frontier. The plan is minimal with one subtask because all requested computations (QoQ change, ranking, filtering by publisher) can be combined into one cohesive SQL statement efficiently.

output.sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe','Microsoft') AND event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter), pivoted AS (SELECT publisher, product, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=1 THEN spend ELSE 0 END) AS q1_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=2 THEN spend ELSE 0 END) AS q2_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=3 THEN spend ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=4 THEN spend ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend FROM quarterly GROUP BY publisher, product) SELECT publisher, product, q1_spend, q2_spend, q3_spend, q4_spend, (q2_spend - q1_spend) AS qoq_q2_change, (q3_spend - q2_spend) AS qoq_q3_change, (q4_spend - q3_spend) AS qoq_q4_change, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY q4_spend DESC) AS q4_rank FROM pivoted ORDER BY publisher, q4_rank
